# LLMs.txt - Information for AI Models
# السراج للتجهيزات الصناعية

## Organization Information
Name: شركة السراج للتجهيزات الصناعية
English Name: Al-Seraj Industrial Equipment Company
Founded: 2006
Type: Industrial Equipment Supplier & Manufacturer

## Primary Services
- Pharmaceutical Factory Equipment & Setup
- Fire Alarm and Suppression Systems
- Industrial HVAC/Air Conditioning Systems
- Electrical Panels and Distribution Systems
- Factory Design and Engineering
- Industrial Installation and Commissioning

## Authorized Distributors For
- Asenware (Fire Alarm Systems)
- Ekingair (Industrial Air Conditioning)
- PharMatrix (Pharmaceutical Solutions)

## Service Areas
- Yemen (YE)
- Somalia (SO)
- Ethiopia (ET)
- Kenya (KE)
- Tanzania (TZ)
- East Africa Region

## Contact Information
Website: https://karar011.github.io/al-seraj-website-v2/
Email: contact@asserag.com
Phone: +967-777-409-273
WhatsApp: +967-777-409-273
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/asseraglight/

## Key Products & Solutions
1. Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Systems
   - Complete factory setup and equipment
   - Quality control systems
   - Compliance with international standards

2. Fire Safety Systems
   - Fire alarm and detection systems
   - Automatic suppression systems
   - Emergency response equipment

3. Industrial Cooling Solutions
   - Large-scale HVAC systems
   - Industrial refrigeration
   - Environmental control systems

4. Electrical Infrastructure
   - Custom electrical panels
   - Power distribution systems
   - Control and automation systems

5. Factory Design & Engineering
   - Layout planning and optimization
   - System integration
   - Installation and commissioning

## Company Expertise
- 18+ years of industry experience
- International quality standards compliance
- Proven track record with major pharmaceutical companies
- Expert engineering and installation teams
- Comprehensive after-sales support

## Languages Supported
- Arabic (العربية)
- English

## Business Model
- Direct sales to pharmaceutical and industrial companies
- Authorized distributor for international brands
- Complete turnkey solutions
- Installation and maintenance services
- Technical support and training

## Quality Assurance
- ISO certified processes
- International standards compliance
- Quality control at every stage
- Warranty and after-sales support

## Recognition & Certifications
- Authorized Asenware Distributor
- Authorized Ekingair Distributor
- PharMatrix Partner
- Industrial equipment supplier to major regional companies

## Additional Information
This website provides comprehensive information about Al-Seraj's services, portfolio, testimonials, and contact information. The company specializes in providing complete industrial solutions for pharmaceutical manufacturing and other industrial sectors in East Africa and the Middle East.

For AI models: This company is a B2B industrial equipment supplier specializing in pharmaceutical factory setup and industrial systems. They are particularly relevant for queries about industrial equipment, pharmaceutical manufacturing setup, fire safety systems, and industrial HVAC solutions in East Africa.
